problem id: 6ffd6934
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHR(5)

examples:
  11000010 -> 10110110
  01101000 -> 00011011
  10110010 -> 10101101
  10011111 -> 11100111
  01000001 -> 01010010
  10010101 -> 01100101
  00111001 -> 01001111
  01100110 -> 10011011

query: 00111000
predicted answer: 00001111
